module_info.docstring:
CI Performance Regression Detection Tests.

This test module is designed to run in CI to catch performance regressions.
It compares current benchmark results against baseline thresholds defined in
baselines.json.

Reference: mcp_agent_mail-tty (CI performance regression detection task)

Usage:
    # Run regression checks (uses existing benchmark results)
    pytest tests/benchmarks/test_ci_regression.py -v

    # Run with benchmarks first (generates fresh results)
    RUN_BENCHMARKS=1 pytest tests/benchmarks/ -v -m "benchmark or ci_regression"

Environment variables:
    CI_REGRESSION_STRICT: Set to "1" to fail on warnings too (default: errors only)
    CI_REGRESSION_SKIP: Set to "1" to skip regression checks entirely

methods.name: test_query_count_assertion_passes_under_threshold
methods.docstring: Query count assertion should pass when under threshold.

methods.name: test_query_count_assertion_fails_over_threshold
methods.docstring: Query count assertion should fail when over threshold.

classes.name: TestQueryCountIntegration
classes.docstring:
Integration tests for query counting during actual operations.

These tests run actual MCP tool calls and verify query counts
stay within expected bounds.

methods.name: test_send_message_query_count
methods.docstring: Verify send_message stays within query count threshold.

methods.name: test_fetch_inbox_query_count
methods.docstring: Verify fetch_inbox stays within query count threshold.

methods.name: test_list_outbox_query_count
methods.docstring: Verify list_outbox stays within query count threshold.

functions.name: _should_skip_regression
functions.docstring: Check if regression checks should be skipped.

functions.name: _is_strict_mode
functions.docstring: Check if strict mode is enabled (fail on warnings).

functions.name: test_performance_regression_check
functions.docstring:
Main CI regression check - fails if thresholds exceeded.

This test:
1. Loads baseline thresholds from baselines.json
2. Loads latest benchmark results from tests/benchmarks/results/
3. Compares each metric against thresholds
4. Renders a Rich report to stdout for CI logs
5. Writes JSON artifact for CI download
6. Fails if any violation (error) is found

functions.name: test_baselines_file_valid
functions.docstring: Validate that baselines.json is well-formed and has required fields.

functions.name: test_regression_report_json_artifact
functions.docstring: Test that regression report JSON artifact is properly generated.

functions.name: test_regression_with_strict_mode
functions.docstring:
Test regression check in strict mode (fails on warnings too).

Only runs if CI_REGRESSION_STRICT=1 is set.
